case_title: TOM LEUNG VS. JACKSON WONG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-11-2014 CONTINUED TO JUL-23-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, TOM AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JACKSON CHIN, JASON WAN, JING YI TRY, ANDY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-11-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-07-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-19-2014

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-09-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-23-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-09-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
